hotels.name: Pullman Phuket Arcadia Karon Beach Resort
hotels.valueProp: Phuket's biggest hilltop family resort with five pools, ocean-view rooms and a 3-minute walk down to the south end of Karon Beach.
hotels.aiSeoNote: Rebranded in 2018 from Hilton Phuket Arcadia. Some older booking listings still use the old name.
pros: Five separate pools spread across 75 acres — kids', lagoon, infinity, lap, family
All rooms have private balconies with sea or pool views (no parking-lot rooms)
Free shuttle every 30 minutes down to Karon Beach + into Karon village
Strong kids' club + dedicated family floors
Three on-site restaurants + two bars — fine to never leave the resort
cons: It's a hilltop resort, not beachfront — every beach trip needs the shuttle or a taxi
Resort is huge — 10-min walk between farthest rooms and lobby/restaurants
Dinner buffet pricing trends $45–60 pp without alcohol
Wi-Fi reliable in rooms, patchy at the far pool decks
Peak season can mean 30-min wait at breakfast 8–9am

bestRoomTypes.name: Deluxe Ocean View King
bestRoomTypes.for: Couples wanting Andaman sunsets from the balcony

bestRoomTypes.name: Deluxe Family Room
bestRoomTypes.for: Two adults + two kids, sleeps 4 with twin layout

bestRoomTypes.name: Junior Suite Pool Access
bestRoomTypes.for: Direct walk-out to the lagoon pool from the terrace

bestRoomTypes.name: Pullman Suite
bestRoomTypes.for: Honeymoons or special-occasion stays — separate living area

hotels.location: Hilltop on the south side of Karon, between Karon Beach and Kata Beach. Address: 99 Patak Road, Karon, Phuket 83100.
hotels.transfer: Phuket International Airport (HKT) → 50–60 min by Grab (~600–800 THB). Resort airport limousine $35 one-way. Beach shuttle every 30 min from 08:00 to 23:00.

faq.q: Is Pullman Phuket Arcadia on Karon Beach?
faq.a: It's a hilltop resort 200 m back from the south end of Karon Beach — about 3 minutes downhill on foot or one stop on the free 30-minute shuttle. No private beach access; you join the public sand like everyone else.

faq.q: What was Pullman Phuket Arcadia called before?
faq.a: Until 2018 it was Hilton Phuket Arcadia Resort & Spa. Accor (Pullman's parent) took over the management and rebranded; the buildings and grounds are the same.

faq.q: How many pools does Pullman Arcadia Karon have?
faq.a: Five — a 65 m lagoon pool, a kids' pool with shallow zone, an adults-only infinity pool, a lap pool, and a smaller pool near the family wing.

faq.q: Is Pullman Phuket Arcadia good for families?
faq.a: Yes — it's one of Phuket's strongest family picks. Dedicated kids' club (4–12 yrs, included), connecting family rooms, kids' menu in every restaurant, and the spread-out grounds let kids burn energy without bothering other guests.

faq.q: Does Pullman Karon include breakfast?
faq.a: Most published rates include the buffet breakfast. Check the rate name — "Standard" or "Bed & Breakfast" includes it; "Room Only" does not. Add-on breakfast at the door is roughly $25–30 pp.

hotels.name: Centara Grand Beach Resort Phuket
hotels.pools: Lagoon pool with water slides + adult pool
hotels.valueProp: Karon's only true beachfront five-star — the lagoon pool meets the sand and kids can run from breakfast to the surf in two minutes.
hotels.aiSeoNote: Often searched as "Centara Karon Resort Phuket". The full Centara Grand is the beachfront flagship; not to be confused with the smaller Centara Karon Resort (a separate sister property up the road).
pros: Only resort with private beachfront access on Karon — step from your sun lounger into the Andaman
Lagoon pool with three water slides — the unofficial winner with kids 6–12
Camp Safari kids' club included; teen room with consoles + pool table
Beachfront restaurant The Cove for sunset seafood
Five-minute walk to Karon village + Wednesday/Saturday night markets
cons: Sea-view rooms cost $50–80 more than identical mountain-view; in the resort itself the difference is mostly bragging rights
Beachfront location means surf-noise — light sleepers should request rooms above the 4th floor
Restaurant prices on the high side ($35–55 pp dinner without alcohol)
Lobby and main pool can feel busy in Dec–Feb peak with package tour groups
Spa pricing aimed at hotel guests — same massage costs 2× a Karon Road shop

bestRoomTypes.name: Deluxe Mountain View
bestRoomTypes.for: Couples or solo travelers fine without a sea view

bestRoomTypes.name: Deluxe Ocean Facing
bestRoomTypes.for: Sunset chasers — west-facing balconies above the pool deck

bestRoomTypes.name: Deluxe Family Suite
bestRoomTypes.for: Two-bedroom layout with bunk room for kids

bestRoomTypes.name: Royal Cabana
bestRoomTypes.for: Direct lagoon-pool walkout — premium pick for couples

hotels.location: Directly on the central stretch of Karon Beach — the wide white-sand section, 5 min walk from Karon Circle and the night markets.
hotels.transfer: Phuket International Airport (HKT) → 45–55 min by Grab (~550–750 THB). Resort airport transfer 1,800 THB one-way for 1–3 pax. Patong Beach 15–20 min by Grab.

faq.q: Is Centara Grand directly on Karon Beach?
faq.a: Yes — it's the only beachfront five-star on Karon. The lagoon pool meets the beach edge; you walk through a small wooden gate and you're on the sand.

faq.q: Does Centara Grand Karon have water slides?
faq.a: Yes — the lagoon pool has three water slides aimed at kids age 6+. Smaller children have a dedicated shallow splash area beside the main pool.

faq.q: Is Centara Karon adults-only?
faq.a: No — it's family-focused with a kids' club, water slides and family suites. Centara Grand Karon does have a separate quiet adults-only pool if you want a break from the noise.

faq.q: How far is Centara Grand from Phuket Old Town?
faq.a: About 22 km — 35–45 min by Grab depending on traffic, around 350–450 THB. Old Town is a worthwhile half-day trip from Karon.

faq.q: Centara Grand Karon vs Centara Karon Resort — what's the difference?
faq.a: Centara Grand is the beachfront flagship (this page). Centara Karon Resort is a sister property a few streets back — quieter, smaller, no direct beach access. Same brand, different products.

hotels.name: Mandarava Resort and Spa Karon Beach
hotels.valueProp: Nine cascading pools tumbling down a forested hillside — Karon's most photogenic property and a steal for the price tier.
pros: Nine connected pools on terraced hillside — every section has a private pool feel
Free shuttle every 20 min to Karon Beach (3-min ride)
Strong spa — 90-min Thai massage $35 vs $50+ at the bigger five-stars
Quieter atmosphere than the beachfront resorts — guests skew older couples
Pool-access rooms genuinely walk straight into water from the terrace
cons: It's a 12-min walk down (and back up) to the beach — the shuttle is essential
Hilltop location means lots of steps between the lobby and far rooms — not ideal for limited-mobility guests
Restaurants OK but not destination-worthy — most guests Grab to Karon for dinner
Wi-Fi can be weak in the lower-numbered villas
Buffet breakfast smaller selection than Pullman or Centara

bestRoomTypes.name: Deluxe Garden View
bestRoomTypes.for: Best value — full pool access via shared deck steps away

bestRoomTypes.name: Deluxe Pool Access
bestRoomTypes.for: Walk straight from terrace into one of the cascading pools

bestRoomTypes.name: Junior Suite Pool Access
bestRoomTypes.for: Larger room + dedicated semi-private pool section

bestRoomTypes.name: Two-Bedroom Pool Suite
bestRoomTypes.for: Families of 4 — two bedrooms with a shared pool terrace

hotels.location: Hilltop above Karon, accessed via a winding driveway off Patak Road. Below the resort the hillside drops to the beach via the village.
hotels.transfer: Phuket International Airport (HKT) → 50 min by Grab (~600 THB). Beach shuttle every 20 min from 08:00 to 22:00. To Patong: 20 min by Grab.

faq.q: How many pools does Mandarava Karon have?
faq.a: Nine connected pools cascading down the hillside. Many rooms have direct pool access, and the design means you can usually find an empty pool section even in peak season.

faq.q: Is Mandarava on Karon Beach?
faq.a: No — it's a hilltop resort 850 m back from Karon Beach (about a 12-min walk down or a 3-min ride on the free shuttle, which runs every 20 min until 10pm).

faq.q: Is Mandarava Resort Karon family-friendly?
faq.a: Yes, but it leans more toward couples and small families with kids 7+. The hillside layout has lots of steps and isn't ideal for strollers or toddlers.

faq.q: What's the difference between pool-access and standard rooms at Mandarava?
faq.a: Pool-access rooms have a terrace that opens directly onto a shared pool — three steps and you're swimming. Standard rooms have garden or hillside views and use the central pools, a 1–2 minute walk away.

faq.q: How is the Mandarava spa priced?
faq.a: Treatments run roughly $35–60 — significantly cheaper than the major five-stars on Karon. A 90-min Thai massage is around $35; aromatherapy oil massage $45–55.

hotels.name: Beyond Resort Karon
hotels.valueProp: Adults-only beachfront resort on the quieter north end of Karon — couples-only crowd, no kids' splashing, direct access to the sand.
pros: Adults-only (16+) — no kids splashing in the pool or running through the lobby
True beachfront — sun loungers on the sand are part of the resort, not the public beach
North-end Karon location is the quietest part of the beach
Sunset bar over the sand — drinks and Andaman views without leaving the property
Smaller scale (192 rooms) means quicker service than 250+ room neighbors
cons: Adults-only means hotel skews honeymooners + 50+ couples — solo travelers can feel out of place
North end of Karon is a 10–15 min walk from the village + restaurants
Beach here gets rocky at low tide — better for sunset walks than swimming at 7am
A/C in older rooms can be noisy — request newly renovated wing
Only two pools — peak season they fill up by 10am

bestRoomTypes.name: Deluxe Garden View
bestRoomTypes.for: Couples on a tighter budget — same beach access as pricier rooms

bestRoomTypes.name: Deluxe Pool View
bestRoomTypes.for: Mid-tier — quiet inner pool side

bestRoomTypes.name: Deluxe Sea View
bestRoomTypes.for: Sunset balconies — book at least 2 months ahead in high season

bestRoomTypes.name: Beyond Suite
bestRoomTypes.for: Anniversaries + honeymoons — separate lounge, terrace and outdoor bath

hotels.location: North-end Karon Beach, where the beach is widest and quietest. About 15 min walk south to Karon Circle and the main village.
hotels.transfer: Phuket International Airport (HKT) → 45–55 min by Grab (~550–750 THB). Patong Beach 12–15 min by Grab. No direct shuttle to Patong/Old Town — Grab is the move.

faq.q: Is Beyond Resort Karon adults-only?
faq.a: Yes — the minimum age is 16. It's one of the few true adults-only resorts on Karon Beach and the only beachfront one in this price tier.

faq.q: Where on Karon Beach is Beyond Resort located?
faq.a: North end of Karon — the wider, quieter section of the beach. About a 15-minute beach-side walk to Karon Circle (the main village area).

faq.q: Is the beach at Beyond Resort good for swimming?
faq.a: Yes during the November–April high season. May–October the Andaman gets rough on the west coast; lifeguards post red flags and swimming is restricted on bigger-surf days.

faq.q: Does Beyond Resort Karon include breakfast?
faq.a: Most rates include the buffet breakfast. The Sea View terrace breakfast is the highlight — book a sunrise table the day before.

faq.q: Is Beyond Resort good for honeymooners?
faq.a: Yes — adults-only, beachfront, and the Beyond Suite category is built around couples (separate lounge, outdoor bath, sunset terrace). Mention you're celebrating when booking — most stays get a fruit plate or sparkling wine on arrival.

hotels.name: Avista Grande Phuket Karon — MGallery
hotels.pools: Rooftop infinity pool + main pool + kids' pool
hotels.valueProp: Sofitel's MGallery boutique line — design-led rooms, a rooftop infinity pool with Andaman views, and personalised service the big resorts can't match.
pros: Ranked top 10 hotels in Thailand by TripAdvisor (2023) — service consistently the highlight
Rooftop infinity pool with sunset Andaman views — a Karon highlight
Boutique scale (158 rooms) means staff remember names by day two
Strong design — concrete + teak + local Phuket-Hokkien art accents in every room
Upper floors get genuine sea views over the village rooftops
cons: Not beachfront — 8 min walk to Karon Beach via main road (no shuttle)
Pool deck is shaded by mid-afternoon — sun-seekers go elsewhere after 3pm
Boutique pricing means breakfast adds $25 if you skip the inclusive rate
Spa is small (4 rooms) — book your treatment when you book the room
Lobby restaurant has limited Thai options — most guests Grab into the village for variety

bestRoomTypes.name: Superior Room
bestRoomTypes.for: Couples — base pick, all the design and service, no balcony

bestRoomTypes.name: Deluxe Balcony Room
bestRoomTypes.for: Higher floors with private balconies — light sleepers want the back of the building

bestRoomTypes.name: Junior Suite
bestRoomTypes.for: Honeymoons — separate lounge area, freestanding tub

bestRoomTypes.name: Grande Pool Suite
bestRoomTypes.for: Splurge — semi-private plunge pool on terrace

hotels.location: Off Patak Road in Karon's central area, a quick 8-min walk to the wide central beach section and 3 min to Karon Circle's restaurants.
hotels.transfer: Phuket International Airport (HKT) → 50 min by Grab (~600–700 THB). To Phuket Old Town 35 min, to Patong 15 min. Hotel arranges airport transfer for 1,500 THB.

faq.q: Is Avista Grande Karon on the beach?
faq.a: Not directly — it's an 8-minute walk (about 650 m) along well-lit roads to the central section of Karon Beach. The rooftop pool gives you Andaman views from inside the property.

faq.q: What's the rooftop pool at Avista Grande like?
faq.a: It's an infinity-edge pool 8 floors up with full Andaman sunset views. Pool bar attached. Quiet at sunrise, busy 4–6pm during sunset hour.

faq.q: Is Avista Grande Karon part of Sofitel?
faq.a: It's part of MGallery — Accor's boutique collection that sits under the Sofitel umbrella. Each MGallery property has its own design; here the theme is contemporary Thai with Phuket Sino-Portuguese accents.

faq.q: Is Avista Grande good for honeymooners?
faq.a: Yes — the boutique scale, rooftop pool and spa make it a strong honeymoon pick. The Junior Suite category is the sweet spot for couples celebrating something.

faq.q: How does Avista Grande compare to Pullman Arcadia?
faq.a: Avista is smaller, more design-led, more suited to couples. Pullman is bigger, more family-oriented, more pools but less service-personality. If you want kids' clubs and water slides — Pullman. If you want a quieter boutique stay — Avista.
